ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business category */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the business */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude coordinates for mapping */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude coordinates for mapping */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the business location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the business is located */,
  "formatted_address" TEXT /* Formatted address for display purposes */,
  "cross_street" TEXT /* Cross street for better location identification */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the business is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business for contact purposes */,
  "business_status" TEXT /* Current status of the business (e.g., active, closed, under maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the business was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the business information was last updated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the business based on user reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_neighborhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Taco Place, Gym) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the category entails */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon or image representing the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinates of the neighborhood center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinates of the neighborhood center */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the neighborhood was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the neighborhood information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., from 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user regarding their experience */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_hours" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of hours */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business to which these hours apply */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time for the business */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time for the business */,
  "is_open_24_hours" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business is open 24/7 */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the business hours were set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the business hours were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_hours_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business to which the photo belongs */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or caption for the photo */,
  "photo_status" TEXT /* Status of the photo (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the photo was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the photo was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business offering the promotion */,
  "promo_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotional offer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion (e.g., active, expired, upcoming) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the promotion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the business as favorite */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business marked as favorite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the business was marked as a favorite */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the favorite entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)
